{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Akura Malice’s bloodline legacy
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Akura Malice]]'s bloodline legacy is made of shadow and force.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
